issues.description: Action type is 'RevealFromHand' but card text says 'place 2 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck' — should be a custom deck placement action or SearchDeck variant, not RevealFromHand. RevealFromHand reveals cards from hand to opponent, not manipulates trash/deck.
Missing 'optional' flag — text says 'You may place', indicating optional effect. Current DSL structure doesn't reflect optionality.
Filter references 'subType' but should reference cards in trash with type 'CP' (likely a main type or keyword, not subType). Filter scope is also wrong — should target trash, not hand.
Conditional action structure is incorrect. The KO should only trigger if player successfully places 2 CP cards; current nesting doesn't clearly enforce this dependency.
